title: Two Halves
discovery_hint: 栈总是最后进去的先出来。

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: Two halves. Each reversed. Then put back together.

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: That's what remembering is. You take the pieces of someone,

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: run them backward in time, and fit them next to each other.

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: It's not perfect. But it's something.
